attention3.ptxt: Perform this check in the following cases.

item.ptxt: When replacing front brake pads with new ones.
When checking thickness of front brake pads.

servinfosub.title: Caliper Body and Carrier
servinfosub.ptxt: Check brake caliper body and carrier for deformation, crack, damage and rust. Replace front brake caliper and carrier if defective.

servinfosub.title: Cylinder Boot
servinfosub.ptxt: Check cylinder boot (1) for break, crack and brake fluid leak. Replace cylinder boot if defective.

servinfosub.title: Slide Pin
servinfosub.ptxt: Before installing caliper to carrier, check slide pins for smooth thrust movement.
